name: Texmati Rice
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chicken or vegetable broth (or stock)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring broth and 1 cup water to a boil in a large pot. Stir in rice, white wine, salt, and pepper. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until liquid is absorbed.
2. Remove bay leaf and stir in onion, garlic, shallot, ginger, olive oil, cumin, paprika, oregano, and peas. Cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Transfer rice to a serving dish and let rest for 10 minutes before fluffing with a fork. Serve warm or at room temperature.
